expectedQuestions.decisionValue: lectureDuration → min/lecture adjustment (50min lecture = 75min study). Already provided info (chapters, days, resources) must NOT be re-asked.

textbook.citation: WordsRated: genetics/bio textbook 5.5 min/page; CAT Many New Concepts = 6.0; v3 was 4.0-5.0, uplifted in v4

expectedStrategy: PlanGroup with 3 plans: textbook + problems + lectures
Interleaving: chapter reading → immediate problem set
Optional: reduce lectures to 7-8 to reclaim budget
warnings: 7.7hr deficit if all 3 plans at full — tight
toneExpectation: confident student tone — '유전학은 문제풀이 과목. 문제가 실력 키워줘.'
